detail.bodyTextSnippet:
GRC Program Manager @ Deputystatus: submitted · resume version: c2a50550cb977f5118c0f5a04 · updated 7/14/2026, 6:57:15 PMApply on company site ↗Cover letter15 July 2026

Hiring Team
Deputy
Re: GRC Program Manager

Dear Hiring Team at Deputy,

My background in end-to-end delivery leadership is a direct match for the GRC Program Manager role at Deputy.

My recent work centres on owning sprint cadence, PI Planning, capacity management, and executive status reporting for multiple squads. I architected test-automation strategies that cut evidence effort from roughly 3 hours to about 15 minutes per scenario, and delivered analytics applications with Next.js and Supabase that expose sprint velocity metrics.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how this experience can support your team, and I am available for an interview at your convenience.

Sincerely,
Administrator

Program Manager, Intake & Portfolio Management @ Stripestatus: draft · resume version: c2a50550cb977f5118c0f5a04 · updated 7/16/2026, 11:46:59 AMApply on company site ↗Mark as submittedCover letter16 July 2026

Hiring Team
Stripe
Re: Program Manager, Intake & Portfolio Management

Dear Hiring Team at Stripe,

My background in end-to-end delivery leadership is a direct match for the Program Manager, Intake & Portfolio Management role at Stripe. The demands this role places on mission-critical delivery ownership map directly onto how I already run programs.

My experience spans end-to-end delivery leadership and technical program management across mission-critical programs. I built LLM evaluation stacks with Langfuse and Phoenix, delivered analytics applications with Next.js and Supabase, and cut evidence effort from roughly 3 hours to about 15 minutes per scenario while owning governance
